gold_change_reason: Original seed code did not implement content-based format detection, duplicate compound detection, or strict malformed line errors. New code adds these features required by D, C, and A operators.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the requirement for content-based format detection.
Scaled executable cases must expose the requirement for duplicate detection.
Scaled executable cases must expose the robustness requirements against malformed lines and mislabeled extensions.
implementation_notes: Added detect_format_by_content() that checks first non-empty line for tab (TSV) or colon (YAML).
Modified parse_exchange_table_file and parse_exchange_yaml_file to accept list of lines, raise ParseError on malformed lines and duplicate compounds.
parse_exchange_file now reads all lines, performs content detection first, then falls back to extension if content detection fails, ensuring correct parsing of misleading extensions.
